update_description:
✨ Clean Settings & Immersive Lyrics

* Liquid Glass theme is now fully stable and polished ✨
* Added Liquid Glass customization options for a more personalized experience 🎨
* Introduced Apple Music–style bottom navigation bar and mini player collapse behavior 🍎🎵
* Added a setting to auto-hide playback controls and song details on the lyrics screen for a true fullscreen experience 📖🖥️
* Tapping anywhere on the fullscreen lyrics screen now instantly reveals player controls 👆
* Cleaned up the Settings menu by removing duplicate Liquid Glass options and app icon customization entries 🧹
* Replaced dynamic theme generation with optimized static themes for better consistency and performance ⚡
* Updated the Settings screen icon and fixed multiple background player issues 🛠️
* General bug fixes, stability improvements, and UI refinements 🚀
